underlying_goal: Compile a new deployment version of SIA receiver software for a customer called Skive, with a new config file containing their building/area data and a license expiring around July 1st 2026
friction_detail: Minor confusion around the expiry date format (ISO 07-05 was momentarily misread as May 7th by user, but turned out to be fine).
brief_summary: User needed to compile a new deployment package for a Skive customer with custom config and ~6 month license; Claude backed up old config, created new one, ran the deploy script, and delivered the ZIP successfully.
